comment: Code review accepted the BLP-6 file-embed mount-scroll regression; Android Mobile root cause remains unproved.

page.summary: Code review accepts the BLP-6 mitigation patch for Human Review: the file-embed Live Preview mount-scroll regression and targeted validation pass, with Android Mobile root cause still explicitly unproved.

outOfScope: Android Mobile root cause remains with the parent BLP-5 RCA.
Fresh CDP proof was not produced during code review because fixed port 19225 was not reachable.
